description_for_human: A public Packrift attribute-constraint reference built from approved in-stock catalog records. It parses material, color, closure, printer, strength, and pack-count signals so agents and buyers can avoid unsafe substitutions.
description_for_model: A public Packrift attribute-constraint reference built from approved in-stock catalog records. It parses material, color, closure, printer, strength, and pack-count signals so agents and buyers can avoid unsafe substitutions.
